instruction: At the harbor, the green stripe on one buoy was painted red, the sailboat mast looks much too heavy, and the rope coil has lost its neat loop. Correct those small mistakes without changing the surrounding scene.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 220 140" width="220" height="140">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="220" height="140" fill="#f8fffb" />
  <rect id="sky" fill="#bfdbfe" x="0" y="0" width="220" height="70" />
  <rect id="water" fill="#0ea5e9" x="0" y="70" width="220" height="70" />
  <line id="horizon" stroke="#0284c7" stroke-width="2" x1="0" y1="70" x2="220" y2="70" />
  <circle id="sun" fill="#fde047" cx="190" cy="22" r="12" />
  <ellipse id="cloud-left" fill="#f8fafc" cx="36" cy="26" rx="18" ry="7" />
  <ellipse id="cloud-right" fill="#f8fafc" cx="56" cy="25" rx="14" ry="6" />
  <rect id="pier-deck" fill="#92400e" x="0" y="88" width="72" height="10" />
  <path id="rope-coil" fill="none" stroke="#f8fafc" stroke-width="2" d="M48 82 C54 70 74 72 76 86 C78 100 52 100 48 90 C44 78 58 76 66 88" />
  <line id="pier-leg-1" stroke="#451a03" stroke-width="4" x1="16" y1="96" x2="13" y2="132" />
  <line id="pier-leg-2" stroke="#451a03" stroke-width="4" x1="56" y1="96" x2="60" y2="132" />
  <polygon id="boat-hull" fill="#0f766e" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" points="84,84 158,84 146,104 96,104" />
  <rect id="boat-cabin" fill="#f8fafc" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" x="106" y="62" width="30" height="20" />
  <rect id="cabin-window" fill="#93c5fd" stroke="#222" stroke-width="0.8" x="114" y="67" width="14" height="8" />
  <line id="mast" stroke="#222" stroke-width="6" x1="126" y1="84" x2="126" y2="26" />
  <polygon id="sail-main" fill="#fef3c7" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" points="126,30 154,76 126,76" />
  <polygon id="sail-small" fill="#e0f2fe" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" points="124,34 100,76 124,76" />
  <polygon id="flag" fill="#14b8a6" points="126,25 140,29 126,33" />
  <polygon id="lighthouse-body" fill="#f8fafc" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" points="176,82 206,82 200,28 182,28" />
  <rect id="lighthouse-stripe-1" fill="#ef4444" x="181" y="48" width="20" height="7" />
  <rect id="lighthouse-stripe-2" fill="#ef4444" x="179" y="64" width="24" height="7" />
  <rect id="lighthouse-cap" fill="#0f172a" x="180" y="22" width="22" height="8" />
  <rect id="lighthouse-window" fill="#fde047" stroke="#222" stroke-width="0.7" x="188" y="34" width="6" height="8" />
  <polygon id="light-beam" fill="#fde68a" opacity="0.45" points="180,30 132,18 132,42" />
  <circle id="buoy-red" fill="#f8fafc" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" cx="42" cy="112" r="8" />
  <rect id="buoy-red-stripe" fill="#ef4444" x="35" y="110" width="14" height="4" />
  <circle id="buoy-green" fill="#f8fafc" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" cx="184" cy="112" r="7" />
  <rect id="buoy-green-stripe" fill="#ef4444" x="178" y="110" width="12" height="4" />
  <polyline id="wave-1" fill="none" stroke="#0ea5e9" stroke-width="2" points="6,122 22,118 38,122 54,118 70,122" />
  <path id="harbor-wave-long" fill="none" stroke="#0ea5e9" stroke-width="2" d="M82 118 C98 112 112 124 128 118 S158 112 174 118" />
  <polyline id="wave-2" fill="none" stroke="#0ea5e9" stroke-width="2" points="128,120 146,116 164,120 182,116 200,120" />
  <rect id="crate-left" fill="#a16207" stroke="#451a03" stroke-width="1" x="12" y="76" width="14" height="12" />
  <rect id="crate-right" fill="#b45309" stroke="#451a03" stroke-width="1" x="28" y="76" width="14" height="12" />
  <circle id="skin-02-sun-disc" fill="#fde047" stroke="#f59e0b" stroke-width="3" opacity="0.9" cx="32" cy="28" r="26" />
  <polyline id="skin-02-sail-flags" fill="none" stroke="#334155" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.9" points="92,14 126,22 160,14 198,24" />
  <circle id="identity-02-harbor-sun-ring" fill="#fde68a" stroke="#f59e0b" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.95" cx="34" cy="26" r="13" />
  <line id="identity-02-pennant-line" stroke="#334155" stroke-width="1" x1="116" y1="19" x2="170" y2="28" />
  <polygon id="identity-02-pennant-a" fill="#ef4444" points="122,20 130,21 125,29" />
  <polygon id="identity-02-pennant-b" fill="#22c55e" points="142,23 150,24 145,32" />
  <polygon id="identity-02-pennant-c" fill="#3b82f6" points="160,26 168,27 163,35" />
  <circle id="variant-02-dot" fill="#14b8a6" opacity="0.72" cx="44" cy="32" r="3" />
  <line id="variant-02-rule" stroke="#14b8a6" stroke-width="1.2" opacity="0.58" x1="50" y1="35" x2="66" y2="38" />
  <rect id="variant-02-chip-01" fill="#f59e0b" opacity="0.68" x="10" y="6" width="9" height="3" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-02-chip-02" fill="#84cc16" opacity="0.68" x="47" y="4" width="7" height="4" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-02-chip-03" fill="#22c55e" opacity="0.68" x="78" y="5" width="8" height="3" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-02-chip-04" fill="#14b8a6" opacity="0.68" x="115" y="6" width="9" height="4" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-02-chip-05" fill="#06b6d4" opacity="0.68" x="146" y="4" width="7" height="3" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-02-chip-06" fill="#3b82f6" opacity="0.68" x="183" y="5" width="8" height="4" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-02-chip-07" fill="#6366f1" opacity="0.68" x="10" y="139" width="9" height="3" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-02-chip-08" fill="#8b5cf6" opacity="0.68" x="47" y="141" width="7" height="4" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-02-chip-09" fill="#d946ef" opacity="0.68" x="78" y="140" width="8" height="3" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-02-chip-10" fill="#ec4899" opacity="0.68" x="115" y="139" width="9" height="4" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-02-chip-11" fill="#ef4444" opacity="0.68" x="146" y="141" width="7" height="3" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-02-chip-12" fill="#f97316" opacity="0.68" x="183" y="140" width="8" height="4" rx="1" />
  <circle id="variant-02-pin-01" fill="#22c55e" opacity="0.66" cx="22" cy="24" r="2.3" />
  <circle id="variant-02-pin-02" fill="#14b8a6" opacity="0.66" cx="195" cy="38" r="2.55" />
  <circle id="variant-02-pin-03" fill="#06b6d4" opacity="0.66" cx="8" cy="52" r="1.8" />
  <circle id="variant-02-pin-04" fill="#3b82f6" opacity="0.66" cx="205" cy="66" r="2.05" />
  <circle id="variant-02-pin-05" fill="#6366f1" opacity="0.66" cx="18" cy="80" r="2.3" />
  <circle id="variant-02-pin-06" fill="#8b5cf6" opacity="0.66" cx="191" cy="94" r="2.55" />
  <circle id="variant-02-pin-07" fill="#d946ef" opacity="0.66" cx="28" cy="108" r="1.8" />
  <circle id="variant-02-pin-08" fill="#ec4899" opacity="0.66" cx="201" cy="122" r="2.05" />
</svg>
